== topology ==
[Error] g3rs-topology/no-nested-guardrail3-rs-toml crates/member/guardrail3-rs.toml Nested adopted Rust unit `crates/member` is forbidden
  `crates/member/guardrail3-rs.toml` declares a nested adopted Rust unit under `.`. Nested guardrail3 adoption breaks ownership routing. Remove `crates/member/guardrail3-rs.toml`, or move the inner unit so it is not nested under `.`.
[Error] g3rs-topology/workspace-local-file-placement crates/member/guardrail3-rs.toml `cargo` file `crates/member/guardrail3-rs.toml` is illegally placed
  `crates/member/guardrail3-rs.toml` is nested under `crates/member`. Workspace-local `cargo` files must live directly at the workspace root `.` rather than in nested subdirectories.

  `crates/member/guardrail3-rs.toml` is nested under `crates/member`. Workspace-local `deps` files must live directly at the workspace root `.` rather than in nested subdirectories.
